label: v3 ALIVE — passing beat-synced lamps + volumetric haze/shafts + sub-bass wall breathing; uTime -> song time
note: Nick: 'this is better. how can we bring life to the shader now.' Chose all three of passing lamps / volumetric haze / walls breathe. Node chain UNCHANGED — shader + ctrl_scene pars only.

operations.before: v2 shader — raymarched, ring welds, single static off-axis lamp, no volumetrics, no wall swell; uniforms uTime..uDrift only (9 total)

operations.note: -> me.time.seconds. Beat-sync is IMPOSSIBLE on absTime: wall-clock has no relation to the playhead. Timeline is now 16458 frames = exactly the track, so me.time.seconds IS song position and runs monotonic across a full render. v1's absTime choice was correct AT THE TIME (timeline was then 600 frames, looping every 10s).

operations.parameter: custom pars Bpm / Lampbeats / Beatphase / Haze (new)
